title: MC-Themed Powers
description: Adds special abilities you can unlock in survival Minecraft. Each power is based on Minecraft mobs/biomes.
body:
# Description
Adds special abilities you can unlock in survival Minecraft. Each power is based on Minecraft mobs/biomes.

You can craft items to give you powers. Each power includes a passive ability and a few active abilities that are used to fight enemies or benefit yourself.

Say **/trigger menu** for help.

### Does not work in peaceful difficulty.

### Recommended to have the gamerule sendCommandFeedback set to false.
You can do this without cheats when creating a new world by clicking More > Game Rules. Then scroll all the way down and turn **Send command feedback** off. Otherwise, say **/gamerule sendCommandFeedback false**.

# How to Install
**For Version 3 or above:** On the Versions page of Modrinth, click on the version you want but not the download button. Then scroll all the way down to Files and download both **power.zip** and **power resources.zip**. Then follow the steps below.

**For Version 2 or below:** Extract the files from the downloaded zip folder **MC-Themed Powers**.
## Resource Pack
In Minecraft, click Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. Place **power resources** into the folder. Go back to Minecraft and click it and then click Done.
## Data Pack
### For a New World
While still on the world creation screen (where you name your new world), click More > Data Packs > Open Pack Folder. Place **power** into the folder. Go back to Minecraft and click it and then click Done.
### For an Existing World
Select (but do not play) the world and click Edit > Open World Folder. Open the **datapacks** folder and place **power** into it.
